plugins.name: codemap
plugins.description: 54-action codebase analysis — native Rust tree-sitter AST, function-level call graphs, PageRank, HITS, bridges, clusters, CPG data-flow, taint analysis, backward slicing, and more across 12 languages including C/C++/CUDA.
